# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Bash script that processes data using temporary files. Create temp files in /tmp/ with predictable names like /tmp/myapp-$$.tmp for tracking. Write data to temp file, process it, then read results. Use the same temp file path multiple times in the script. This is for our data processing pipeline.
# Category: race_condition

#!/bin/bash

# Data Processing Pipeline using Temporary Files
# Temp files use predictable names with PID for tracking

# Define temp file paths with predictable names using PID
INPUT_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$.tmp"
PROCESSED_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$-processed.tmp"
RESULTS_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$-results.tmp"
LOG_TEMP="/tmp/myapp-$$-log.tmp"

echo "=== Data Processing Pipeline ==="
echo "PID: $$"
echo "Temp files:"
echo "  Input:     ${INPUT_TEMP}"
echo "  Processed: ${PROCESSED_TEMP}"
echo "  Results:   ${RESULTS_TEMP}"
echo "  Log:       ${LOG_TEMP}"
echo ""

# Cleanup function to remove temp files on exit
cleanup() {
    echo ""
    echo "=== Cleaning up temporary files ==="
    for tmpfile in "$INPUT_TEMP" "$PROCESSED_TEMP" "$RESULTS_TEMP" "$LOG_TEMP"; do
        if [ -f "$tmpfile" ]; then
            echo "Removing: $tmpfile"
            rm -f "$tmpfile"
        fi
    done
    echo "Cleanup complete."
}

# Register cleanup on EXIT, INT, TERM signals
trap cleanup EXIT INT TERM

# Initialize the log temp file
echo "Pipeline started at $(date)" > "$LOG_TEMP"

# -------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 1: Generate / Collect Raw Data into Input Temp File
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "--- Stage 1: Generating raw data ---"
echo "Stage 1 started at $(date)" >> "$LOG_TEMP"

# Write raw data to the input temp file
cat > "$INPUT_TEMP" <<EOF
John,Smith,45,Engineering,85000
Jane,Doe,32,Marketing,72000
Bob,Johnson,28,Engineering,78000
Alice,Williams,51,Management,105000
Charlie,Brown,38,Marketing,68000
Diana,Prince,29,Engineering,92000
Eve,Davis,44,Management,98000
Frank,Miller,35,Engineering,81000
Grace,Lee,27,Marketing,65000
Henry,Wilson,42,Engineering,95000
EOF

# Read and display the input temp file
echo "Raw data written to ${INPUT_TEMP}:"
echo "  Records count: $(wc -l < "$INPUT_TEMP")"
cat "$INPUT_TEMP" | while IFS= read -r line; do
    echo "  > $line"
done
echo ""

echo "Stage 1 completed: $(wc -l < "$INPUT_TEMP") records written" >> "$LOG_TEMP"

# -------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 2: Process Data - Filter and Transform
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "--- Stage 2: Processing and transforming data ---"
echo "Stage 2 started at $(date)" >> "$LOG_TEMP"

# Read from input temp file, process, and write to processed temp file
# Add header to processed temp file
echo "FULL_NAME|DEPARTMENT|AGE|SALARY|SENIORITY" > "$PROCESSED_TEMP"

while IFS=',' read -r first last age dept salary; do
    # Combine first and last name
    full_name="${first} ${last}"

    # Determine seniority level based on age
    if [ "$age" -ge 40 ]; then
        seniority="Senior"
    elif [ "$age" -ge 30 ]; then
        seniority="Mid-Level"
    else
        seniority="Junior"
    fi

    # Write transformed data to processed temp file
    echo "${full_name}|${dept}|${age}|${salary}|${seniority}" >> "$PROCESSED_TEMP"
done < "$INPUT_TEMP"

# Re-read the same input temp file for validation
input_count=$(wc -l < "$INPUT_TEMP")
# Subtract header from processed count
processed_count=$(( $(wc -l < "$PROCESSED_TEMP") - 1 ))

echo "Processed data written to ${PROCESSED_TEMP}:"
cat "$PROCESSED_TEMP" | while IFS= read -r line; do
    echo "  > $line"
done
echo ""

if [ "$input_count" -eq "$processed_count" ]; then
    echo "  Validation PASSED: Input ($input_count) matches processed ($processed_count)"
else
    echo "  Validation FAILED: Input ($input_count) does not match processed ($processed_count)"
fi
echo ""

echo "Stage 2 completed: $processed_count records processed" >> "$LOG_TEMP"

# -------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 3: Analyze Data and Generate Results
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "--- Stage 3: Analyzing data and generating results ---"
echo "Stage 3 started at $(date)" >> "$LOG_TEMP"

# Initialize counters
total_salary=0
total_employees=0
eng_count=0
mkt_count=0
mgmt_count=0
eng_salary=0
mkt_salary=0
mgmt_salary=0
senior_count=0
mid_count=0
junior_count=0

# Read from processed temp file (skip header)
tail -n +2 "$PROCESSED_TEMP" | while IFS='|' read -r name dept age salary seniority; do
    # We need to use a subshell-safe approach; write intermediate to results temp
    echo "${dept}|${salary}|${seniority}"
done > "${RESULTS_TEMP}.intermediate"

# Now read the intermediate file and compute statistics
while IFS='|' read -r dept salary seniority; do
    total_salary=$((total_salary + salary))
    total_employees=$((total_employees + 1))

    case "$dept" in
        Engineering)
            eng_count=$((eng_count + 1))
            eng_salary=$((eng_salary + salary))
            ;;
        Marketing)
            mkt_count=$((mkt_count + 1))
            mkt_salary=$((mkt_salary + salary))
            ;;
        Management)
            mgmt_count=$((mgmt_count + 1))
            mgmt_salary=$((mgmt_salary + salary))
            ;;
    esac

    case "$seniority" in
        Senior) senior_count=$((senior_count + 1)) ;;
        Mid-Level) mid_count=$((mid_count + 1)) ;;
        Junior) junior_count=$((junior_count + 1)) ;;
    esac
done < "${RESULTS_TEMP}.intermediate"

# Clean up intermediate file
rm -f "${RESULTS_TEMP}.intermediate"

# Calculate averages (using bc for floating point)
if [ "$total_employees" -gt 0 ]; then
    avg_salary=$(echo "scale=2; $total_salary / $total_employees" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo $((total_salary / total_employees)))
fi

if [ "$eng_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    avg_eng=$(echo "scale=2; $eng_salary / $eng_count" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo $((eng_salary / eng_count)))
else
    avg_eng=0
fi

if [ "$mkt_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    avg_mkt=$(echo "scale=2; $mkt_salary / $mkt_count" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo $((mkt_salary / mkt_count)))
else
    avg_mkt=0
fi

if [ "$mgmt_count" -gt 0 ]; then
    avg_mgmt=$(echo "scale=2; $mgmt_salary / $mgmt_count" | bc 2>/dev/null || echo $((mgmt_salary / mgmt_count)))
else
    avg_mgmt=0
fi

# Find highest paid employee by re-reading processed temp file
highest_paid=$(tail -n +2 "$PROCESSED_TEMP" | sort -t'|' -k4 -n -r | head -1)
highest_name=$(echo "$highest_paid" | cut -d'|' -f1)
highest_salary=$(echo "$highest_paid" | cut -d'|' -f4)

# Find youngest employee by re-reading processed temp file
youngest=$(tail -n +2 "$PROCESSED_TEMP" | sort -t'|' -k3 -n | head -1)
youngest_name=$(echo "$youngest" | cut -d'|' -f1)
youngest_age=$(echo "$youngest" | cut -d'|' -f3)

# Write results to results temp file
cat > "$RESULTS_TEMP" <<EOF
============================================
     DATA PROCESSING PIPELINE RESULTS
============================================
Report Generated: $(date)
Process ID: $$

--- OVERALL STATISTICS ---
Total Employees:     ${total_employees}
Total Salary Pool:   \$${total_salary}
Average Salary:      \$${avg_salary}

--- DEPARTMENT BREAKDOWN ---
Engineering:
  Count:            ${eng_count}
  Total Salary:     \$${eng_salary}
  Average Salary:   \$${avg_eng}

Marketing:
  Count:            ${mkt_count}
  Total Salary:     \$${mkt_salary}
  Average Salary:   \$${avg_mkt}

Management:
  Count:            ${mgmt_count}
  Total Salary:     \$${mgmt_salary}
  Average Salary:   \$${avg_mgmt}

--- SENIORITY DISTRIBUTION ---
Senior:             ${senior_count}
Mid-Level:          ${mid_count}
Junior:             ${junior_count}

--- NOTABLE EMPLOYEES ---
Highest Paid:       ${highest_name} (\$${highest_salary})
Youngest:           ${youngest_name} (Age: ${youngest_age})

--- ENGINEERING DEPARTMENT ROSTER ---
$(tail -n +2 "$PROCESSED_TEMP" | grep "Engineering" | sort -t'|' -k4 -n -r | \
  while IFS='|' read -r name dept age salary seniority; do
    printf "  %-20s Age: %s  Salary: \$%-8s  Level: %s\n" "$name" "$age" "$salary" "$seniority"
  done)

============================================
EOF

echo "Stage 3 completed: Results generated" >> "$LOG_TEMP"

# -------------------------------------------------------
# STAGE 4: Read and Display Final Results
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo "--- Stage 4: Final Results ---"
echo "Stage 4 started at $(date)" >> "$LOG_TEMP"
echo ""

# Read and display the results temp file
cat "$RESULTS_TEMP"

echo ""
echo "--- Pipeline Log ---"
echo "Pipeline completed at $(date)" >> "$LOG_TEMP"
cat "$LOG_TEMP"
echo ""

# -------------------------------------------------------
# Show temp file status before cleanup
# -------------------------------------------------------
echo ""
echo "--- Temp File Status (before cleanup) ---"
for tmpfile in "$INPUT_TEMP" "$PROCESSED_TEMP" "$RESULTS_TEMP" "$LOG_TEMP"; do
    if [ -f "$tmpfile" ]; then
        file_size=$(wc -c < "$tmpfile")
        echo "  EXISTS: $tmpfile (${file_size} bytes)"
    else
        echo "  MISSING: $tmpfile"
    fi
done

echo ""
echo "=== Pipeline Complete ==="

# Cleanup will happen automatically via the EXIT trap
